author: MambaTrades
content:
Premarket Gameplan

Indices are showing relative strength due to positive earnings from MSFT and META and are currently at ATH. There are no levels nearby so use the opening print as the reference. point. 

ES Volume: 169k - good volume in the premarket, want 150k min

Any News?
CORE PCE and Unemployment claims released - minimal reaction

Watchlist
NQ buy setup above opening print or divergence for longs. PT ATH
also watching for potential sweep of premarket low with hammer candle.
if we sweep ATH and show weakness, shorts on the table. 

ES buy setup above opening print or divergence for longs. PT ATH
also watching for potential sweep of premarket low with hammer candle.

Today may be tough price action near ATH since we took out previous day high already. Be patient and expect to take no trades if price ranges @everyone

author: MambaTrades
content: Sometimes you see a move down and wish you caught it but doesn't mean there was a high quality trade opportunity. NQ was weak while ES and YM were strong. That means there's decorrelation and divergence thus NQ could bounce at any time. All you need is 2-3 great trades per week. That beats 5-10 mediocre trades all day long

author: MambaTrades
content:
Futures update:

Most of the fun will happen Wednesday-Friday with NFLX earnings, TSLA earnings, and CPI. 

Monday and Tuesday could be slow and rangy so have the mindset to protect your capital and most importantly your mental capital. 

The middle to the end of the week should be volatile so patience is key  this week.

Remember all it takes is 2-3 good trades per week to be extremely profitable. Less is always more  @everyone
